creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu 28 aug 08 at 21:46:42 +0200, pgollucci@FreeBSD.org <pgollucci@FreeBSD.org>
 wrote:
> Synopsis: news/slrn: upgrade to 0.9.9.
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: pgollucci
> State-Changed-When: Thu Aug 28 19:46:42 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> superceeded by ports/125255
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=126923

I don't agree: PR ports/125255 propose to upgrade slrn to
slrn-pre0.9.9-124, but PR ports/126923 upgrade it to the final 0.9.9.

Regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
